data.name: Common
data.description: The common tongue spoken across most civilized lands. All characters know Common.

data.name: Abyssal
data.description: The language of the Abyss, spoken by demons and chaotic evil creatures.

data.name: Aquan
data.description: The language of water elementals and aquatic creatures.

data.name: Auran
data.description: The language of air elementals and flying creatures.

data.name: Celestial
data.description: The language of celestials, angels, and other good-aligned outsiders.

data.name: Draconic
data.description: The ancient language of dragons, kobolds, troglodytes, and lizardfolk.

data.name: Druidic
data.description: The secret language of druids. Only druids are permitted to know it. Non-druids who learn it are considered enemies of nature.

data.name: Dwarven
data.description: The language of dwarves, known for its runic alphabet and association with stonework.

data.name: Elven
data.description: The flowing language of elves, often considered the most beautiful of mortal tongues.

data.name: Giant
data.description: The booming language spoken by giants, ogres, and related creatures.

data.name: Gnoll
data.description: The harsh, cackling language of gnolls and other hyena-like humanoids.

data.name: Gnome
data.description: The language of gnomes, similar to Dwarven but with a lighter, more cheerful tone.

data.name: Goblin
data.description: The crude language spoken by goblins, hobgoblins, and bugbears.

data.name: Halfling
data.description: The friendly language of halflings, full of homey expressions and food metaphors.

data.name: Ignan
data.description: The crackling language of fire elementals and creatures from the Elemental Plane of Fire.

data.name: Infernal
data.description: The precise, contract-bound language of devils and the Nine Hells.

data.name: Orc
data.description: The guttural language of orcs, half-orcs, and their kin.

data.name: Sylvan
data.description: The magical language of the fey, dryads, brownies, and leprechauns.

data.name: Terran
data.description: The rumbling language of earth elementals and creatures from the Elemental Plane of Earth.

data.name: Undercommon
data.description: The trade language of the Underdark, spoken by drow and many subterranean races.

data.name: Aboleth
data.description: The ancient telepathic language of aboleths, one of the oldest languages in existence.

data.name: Sphinx
data.description: The riddling language of sphinxes, filled with double meanings and wordplay.

data.name: Githyanki
data.description: The militant language of the githyanki, warriors from the Astral Plane.

data.name: Githzerai
data.description: The monastic language of the githzerai, contemplatives from Limbo.

data.name: Slaad
data.description: The chaotic language of slaadi from the plane of Limbo.

data.name: Yuan-ti
data.description: The serpentine language of yuan-ti, filled with hissing sounds.

data.name: Formian
data.description: The clicking, chemical-based language of formian ant-people.

data.name: Kuo-toa
data.description: The bubbly underwater language of the fish-like kuo-toa.

data.name: Sahuagin
data.description: The harsh underwater language of the predatory sahuagin.
